steps.title: Find the subject and its number
steps.content: The subject of the blank verb is The reliability of the dates — a singular noun. The prepositional phrase and relative clauses that follow are modifiers that don't change the fact that reliability is singular.

steps.title: Apply subject-verb agreement
steps.content: Depends is a singular present-tense verb that matches the singular subject. Depending and having depended are non-finite participles; depend is plural or infinitive — these cannot serve as the main verb of the clause. That matches choice D — D is correct.
